markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy, review performance, and onboard new PMM.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Shift:** Content focus shifts to high-intent competitive articles (e.g., 11 Labs, Whisper) that drive high-value console sign-ups, as confirmed by Dreamdata attribution.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [**PSEO Launch:** The programmatic SEO (PSEO) initiative for language-specific pages is set to launch next week, pending finalization of the Sanity integration.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
  - [**Meeting Cadence:** Syncs will move to a bi-weekly schedule to focus on strategic performance reviews, with weekly updates provided in Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Performance

  - [**Performance Data:** Dreamdata attribution confirms competitive content drives the highest-value conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
      - [**Top Performers:** "11 Labs Whisper" and "Gladia" comparison pages.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
      - [**Underperformers:** "Twilio" and "Amazon Transcribe" pages.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
      - [**Significance:** This data validates the initial strategy and provides clear direction for future content prioritization.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [**Strategic Focus:** Prioritize content that directly addresses high-intent user searches (e.g., "compare 11 labs and Deepgram").](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This approach aims to capture users evaluating alternatives and influence AI models (like Google's AI Overviews) that synthesize information from top-ranking pages.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [**New Topic:** A prescriptive guide on evaluating speech recognition models using open-source datasets (FLIRS, Common Voice).](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Angle:** Position as a reference guide, not a one-off article.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
      - [**Title:** Leverage the high search volume for "FLIRS" directly in the title.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)

### Programmatic SEO (PSEO) Initiative

  - [**Goal:** Launch language-specific landing pages (e.g., "Spanish speech-to-text") to capture low-hanging SEO traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
  - [**Status:** Launch is pending finalization of the Sanity integration, expected this week.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
  - [**Rollout Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [**Staging:** All pages will be staged in Sanity for review before going live.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
      - [**Batching:** Pages will be published in batches of \~10 per week.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [**Interlinking:** A language-selector panel will be added to all pages to improve site navigation and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [**Scaling:** The pipeline is built to support rapid scaling, accommodating the 50+ new languages expected by EOY Q1.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)

### Operational Updates

  - [**Series C Announcement:** Deepgram is pausing blog publishing for 2–3 days to focus on the announcement.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
      - [**Recovery Plan:** Publish 1–2 articles daily next week to catch up.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [**Website Issue:** A Netlify issue is causing slow page loads and broken images on Deepgram's blog.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [**New PMM Onboarding:** Martine Katz (new PMM) was onboarded and granted access to the shared Notion content backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)
      - [Add Martine Katz to the shared Notion content backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
      - [Prioritize 11 Labs content ideas in the backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
      - [Draft the "FLIRS" topic with a keyword-optimized title.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
      - [Update the Looker dashboard to track PSEO page performance.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
  - [**Hasan:**](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
      - [Create a list of competitive content ideas for Whisper.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
      - [Post language updates in the shared Slack channel.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [**Troy & Hasan:**](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Review and approve the backlog of topics, prioritizing 2026-dated content.](https://fathom.video/share/EYSWKCfyP_w9xSArym25u-qVH29nF2Qs?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
